'''Harrandarr''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|21|Harrandarr}}</ref> located in the [[Harrandarr system/Legends|Harrandarr system]], a part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Bosph sector/Legends|Bosph sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Buzchub]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. [[Und'l]], a Buzchub who worked for [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] sympathizers on the<ref name="Package" /> [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]<ref name="EAOC Roldalna">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Roldalna system/Legends|Roldalna system]]</ref> astronomical object [[Roldalna]] shortly after the [[Declaration of a New Republic/Legends|establishment]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]<ref name="Package" /> in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> hailed from Harrandarr.<ref name="Package" />

==Behind the scenes==
Harrandarr was first mentioned in "[[The Package (adventure)|The Package]]," a ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' adventure written by [[Dave Marron]] and published by [[West End Games]] in the [[1993]] book [[Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)|''Twin Stars of Kira'']].<ref name="Package" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Harrandarr [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square Q-3.<ref name="TEA" />
